commands.review_summary:
The PR moves iMessage private-API typing/read-receipt feedback earlier in direct inbound turn handling and updates iMessage monitor tests and iMessage docs.

PR surface: Source +62, Tests +180, Docs 0. Total +242 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: main keeps direct tool-progress options independent of `supportsTyping`, while the PR gates them on a predicate that includes `supportsTyping`. I did not live-reproduce the iMessage UI behavior because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer/contributor follow-up for the predicate regression and real iMessage proof; missing real behavior proof makes this a human-only merge blocker rather than a safe repair-lane request.

target.title: perf(imessage): show typing sooner for slow replies
target.author: omarshahine

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
